creator: wjw@digiware.nl
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #0)

Hi Jan,

As Adraan writes, there is a thigh lock in between Boost Cmake and the CmakeBoost detection module. So to successfully upgrade boost, this also needs to be fixed in Cmake.
Otherwise Cmake will not be able to detect the last update version.

This happens every time Boost upgrades.

Reported this also when we went from 1.64 to 1.65. Not sure on how to make this äutomagically" work for future updates.
